name: lock contracts: lock-acquire on a section whose holder PID is dead AND whose expires has passed succeeds (expires guards crashed holders per §2.7)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/lock-acquire.sh" --section rubric --holder 99999 --expires-in -1 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/lock-acquire.sh" --section rubric --holder $$ --expires-in 60 && echo ok 1>&2
